question_en: The objective of 'Mission Indradhanush' launched in the year 2014 is:

To cover children who are partially vaccinated or unvaccinated during routine immunization.
To provide affordable and quality health services to the rural population.
To provide education to underprivileged children.

ग्रामीण जनसंख्या को किफायती तथा गुणवत्तापूर्ण स्वास्थ्य सेवाएँ प्रदान करना ।
वंचित बच्चों को शिक्षा प्रदान करना।

question_en: Five children A, B, C, D and E are standing in a row facing North, but not necessarily in the same order. 'C' is to the right of 'E' and to the left of 'A'. There is one child between 'A' and 'D'. Who is in the middle of the row?
question_hi: पाँच बच्चे A, B, C, D तथा E उत्तर की ओर मुँह करके एक पंक्ति में खड़े हैं, लेकिन आवश्यक नहीं है कि उसी क्रम में हों। ‘C’, ‘E’ के दाईं ओर और ‘A’, के बाईं ओर है। ‘A’ और ‘D’ के बीच में एक बच्चा है। पंक्ति के मध्य में कौन है ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Based on the arrangement conditions, A is positioned in the exact middle of the row.
fingerprint: five children a b c d and e are standing in a row facing north but not necessarily in the same order c is to the right of e and to the left of a there is one child between a and d who is in the middle of the row

question_en: Below a group of English letters is given in jumbled order. Select the combination of numbers according to which arranging the letters will form a meaningful word. C P K T O E (1 2 3 4 5 6)

subject: reasoning
explanation: Arranging the letters according to 2, 5, 1, 3, 6, 4 gives P O C K E T.
fingerprint: below a group of english letters is given in jumbled order select the combination of numbers according to which arranging the letters will form a meaningful word c p k t o e 1 2 3 4 5 6

question_en: If 'Q' is the brother of the son of 'R's son, then how is 'Q' related to 'R'?
question_hi: यदि ‘Q’, ‘R’ के पुत्र के पुत्र का भाई है, तो ‘Q’, ‘R’ से किस प्रकार संबंधित है ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: The son of R's son is R's grandson. Since Q is the brother of this grandson, Q is also R's grandson.
fingerprint: if q is the brother of the son of rs son then how is q related to r

question_en: If August 25 in a year is Thursday, how many Tuesdays will there be in that month?
question_hi: यदि किसी वर्ष में 25 अगस्त को गुरुवार है, तो उस महीने में कितने मंगलवार होंगे ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: If Aug 25 is Thursday, Aug 23 is Tuesday. Subtracting 7 days repeatedly gives Tuesdays on Aug 16, 9, and 2. Adding 7 gives Aug 30. Total = 5 Tuesdays.
fingerprint: if august 25 in a year is thursday how many tuesdays will there be in that month

question_en: Two statements are followed by two conclusions I and II. Assuming the given statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts, decide which of the given conclusions logically follows from the given statements? Statements: All animals are dogs. Some dogs are dangerous. Conclusions: I. All animals are dangerous. II. Some dogs are animals.
question_hi: दो कथन और उसके बाद दो निष्कर्ष I और II दिए गए हैं। दिए गए कथनों को सत्य मानते हुए चाहे वे सामान्य ज्ञात तथ्यों से भिन्न ही क्यों न प्रतीत होते हों, निर्णय करें कि कौन-सा / से निष्कर्ष दिए गए कथनों के आधार पर तर्कसंगत रूप से निकलता है / निकलते हैं ? कथन: सभी जानवर कुत्ते हैं। कुछ कुत्ते खतरनाक हैं। निष्कर्ष : I. सभी जानवर खतरनाक हैं। II. कुछ कुत्ते जानवर हैं।
options_en: Both conclusions I and II follow.
Neither conclusion I nor II follows.
options_hi: निष्कर्ष I और II दोनों निकलते हैं।
न तो निष्कर्ष I और न ही II निकलता है।
subject: reasoning
explanation: Since all animals are dogs, the converse 'Some dogs are animals' is true. We cannot conclude that all animals are dangerous.
fingerprint: two statements are followed by two conclusions i and ii assuming the given statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance from commonly known facts decide which of the given conclusions logically follows from the given statements statements all animals are dogs some dogs are dangerous conclusions i all animals are dangerous ii some dogs are animals

question_en: If in a certain code language 'COVET' is written as 'FRYHW', then how will 'HIDE' be written in the same language?
question_hi: यदि एक निश्चित कूटभाषा में ‘COVET’ को ‘FRYHW’ लिखा जाता है, तो उसी भाषा में ‘HIDE’ को क्या लिखा जाएगा ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by 3 positions (+3). H+3 = K, I+3 = L, D+3 = G, E+3 = H.
fingerprint: if in a certain code language covet is written as fryhw then how will hide be written in the same language

question_en: A person is standing facing North. He turns 135° in the anti-clockwise direction, then 90° in the clockwise direction. Which direction is he facing now?
question_hi: एक व्यक्ति उत्तर दिशा में मुँह करके खड़ा है। वह वामावर्त दिशा में 135° मुड़ जाता है, उसके बाद दक्षिणावर्त दिशा में 90° मुड़ जाता है। अब उसका मुँह किस दिशा में है ?
subject: reasoning
explanation: Net turn = -135° + 90° = -45° (anti-clockwise). Facing North and turning 45° anti-clockwise gives North-West.
fingerprint: a person is standing facing north he turns 135 in the anticlockwise direction then 90 in the clockwise direction which direction is he facing now

question_en: By selling 17 balls for ₹720, there is a loss equal to the cost price of 5 balls. The cost price of one ball is:
question_hi: 17 गेंदों को ₹ 720 में बेचने पर, 5 गेंदों के क्रय मूल्य बराबर हानि होती है। एक गेंद का मूल्य है:
subject: maths
explanation: Loss = CP of 17 - SP of 17 = CP of 5. So, SP of 17 = CP of 12. Since SP is 720, CP of 12 = 720. Hence CP of 1 ball is 60.
fingerprint: by selling 17 balls for 720 there is a loss equal to the cost price of 5 balls the cost price of one ball is

subject: maths
explanation: Ratio of investment = 22500:35000 = 9:14. Total ratio units = 23. B's share = (14/23) * 27600 = 16800.

question_en: The HCF of two numbers is 28 and their LCM is 336. If one number is 112, then the other number will be:

subject: maths
explanation: We know that LCM × HCF = Product of two numbers. Thus, 336 × 28 = 112 × second number. The second number is 84.

question_en: In equal time, A does 20% less work than B. If A can complete a piece of work in 7.5 hours, in how much time will B complete the same work?
question_hi: बराबर समय में A, B से 20% कम कार्य करता है। यदि A किसी कार्य को 7½ घंटों में पूरा कर सकता है, तो B उसी कार्य को कितने समय में पूरा कर पाएगा?
subject: maths
explanation: If A is 20% slower, efficiency of A:B = 4:5. Time taken is inversely proportional, so Time A:Time B = 5:4. 5x = 7.5 hours, thus x = 1.5. So B takes 4x = 6 hours.
fingerprint: in equal time a does 20 less work than b if a can complete a piece of work in 75 hours in how much time will b complete the same work

question_en: The radius of a cylinder is 5 cm more than its height. If the curved surface area of the cylinder is 792 sq cm, then its volume (in cubic cm) will be:
question_hi: एक बेलन की त्रिज्या उसकी ऊँचाई से 5 सेंटीमीटर अधिक है। यदि बेलन का वक्र पृष्ठ क्षेत्रफल 792 वर्ग सेंटीमीटर है, तो इसका आयतन (घन सेंटीमीटर में) होगा :
subject: maths
explanation: Let height be h, radius be h+5. CSA = 2πr*h = 792. Solving gives h=9, r=14. Volume = πr²h = 5544.
fingerprint: the radius of a cylinder is 5 cm more than its height if the curved surface area of the cylinder is 792 sq cm then its volume in cubic cm will be

question_en: At what rate of simple interest does a sum double itself in 12 years?
question_hi: साधारण ब्याज की किस दर से कोई राशि 12 वर्षों में स्वयं की दुगुनी हो जाती है ?
subject: maths
explanation: Let principal be P. Amount = 2P, so Interest = P. Rate = (I*100)/(P*T) = (P*100)/(P*12) = 100/12 = 8 1/3 %.
fingerprint: at what rate of simple interest does a sum double itself in 12 years

subject: maths
explanation: If discount is 20%, 1600 is 80% of Marked Price. So Marked Price = 1600 / 0.8 = ₹2000.

question_en: Consider the following statements about Gross State Domestic Product (GSDP): (A) Haryana's GSDP is higher than Bihar's GSDP. (B) Punjab's GSDP is higher than Haryana's GSDP.

subject: haryana-gk
explanation: Haryana's GSDP is higher than Bihar, but Punjab's GSDP is actually lower than Haryana's. Thus, only A is true.
